name: AVEO - 510 Easy-Press Plastic Barrel Vortex Mouthpiece
summary: The AVEO Easy-Press Mouthpiece is a top-fill vaporiser cartridge for the cannabis industry.
description: The AVEO Easy-Press Mouthpiece is a top-fill vaporiser cartridge for the cannabis industry. Available in Black or White, it's compatible with Easy-press or Press Release options. We also offer Ceramic Grip mouthpieces exclusively for the Press Release option. Our patented locking system ensures a secure and hygienic seal, preventing leakage and maintaining oil integrity. Pairs with standard 510 cartridges.
